name: @chemag/lsp-server
description: Chemag Language Server Protocol server — wraps @chemag/core's check-edit engine and serves architecture diagnostics + quick-fix code actions over LSP. Bundled inside the chemag-vscode extension and spawned by the `chemag lsp` CLI subcommand; can also be invoked directly by non-VS Code editors (Zed/Helix/Neovim) via `node node_modules/@chemag/lsp-server/dist/server.js` over stdio.
deprecated: chemag-the-framework has been wound down; the three semantic rules now ship as eslint-plugin-port-discipline. This package is preserved for history. See https://github.com/adromero/chem-agnostic#readme for the full story.
